widgets_values: Cinematic elegant shot. The woman stands in warm golden hour sunlight against a minimalist wall, wearing a fitted red satin dress. She looks directly at the camera and slowly steps forward. The camera gently dollies back to maintain framing. She softly says, “I have something to tell you.” The camera slowly pushes in closer as she lifts her hand and plays with her hair, a subtle smile forming. She leans slightly toward the lens and says, “Are you ready?” The light glows on the satin fabric, smooth cinematic motion, intimate and refined atmosphere.

LTX-2 Prompting Guide [HERE](https://ltx.io/model/model-blog/prompting-guide-for-ltx-2)
---
